refnamediv.refpurpose: Wrap a geometry around an X value.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: This function splits the input geometries and then moves every resulting component falling on the right (for negative 'move') or on the left (for positive 'move') of given 'wrap' line in the direction specified by the 'move' parameter, finally re-unioning the pieces together.

note.para: This is useful to "recenter" long-lat input to have features of interest not spawned from one side to the other.

refsection.title: Examples
